chapterPointCustomProperties.value: The BaitFuel Fishing Tour kicks off it's season in Quinte West, Ontario where the teams will fish this Largemouth Bass Only event on the water of the Bay of Quinte.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/PF0h7X23/poster.jpg?width=720
Qualifier 2 for the BaitFuel Fishing Tour is back in Quinte West, Ontario where the teams will fish this Largemouth Bass Only event on the water of the Bay of Quinte.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Cql9cytT/poster.jpg?width=720
Qualifier 3 finds the tour anglers headed to the St. Lawrence River out of Brockville, Ontario.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/nhQ4WR5F/poster.jpg?width=720
This week the teams descend upon Cornwall, Ontario for Qualifier 4 to fish Lake St. Francis for back to back events over the weekend.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/UTI5992Y/poster.jpg?width=720
Dan Cabela explores the model for community conservation in the Zambezi Delta of Mozambique, and responsibly harvests a Cape Buffalo bull on their behalf.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/fEyqoFVm/poster.jpg?width=720
Dan Cabela learns about the recovery of an icon and the role that utilization has played in bringing a species back from the brink - the American Bison.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/7ijBb4df/poster.jpg?width=720
Dan Cabela joins the relocation of one of Africa's most endangered Big Cats to an ecosystem where they have been absent for almost 100 years. Also known as the fastest land mammal - the Cheetah.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/nD2riAaF/poster.jpg?width=720
Dan Cabela explains the domestic trade in exotic wildlife and how some of our planet's most threatened species are being protected by the practice.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/o6CgvGag/poster.jpg?width=720
Justin entices a friend to play hooky from work to set hooks offshore on a perfect "locals" day. The only thing better than the weather was the dinner they caught and cooked.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/GGNmrW2S/poster.jpg?width=720
Witness a truly epic day on the water when Capt. Justin and Meredith find a secluded slice of beach teeming with redfish biting virtually everything.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Kv70hx6p/poster.jpg?width=720
When your gut tells you to do something different than what's in front of you, do you listen? Capt. Justin and Meredith listen, and find that success comes in many forms.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/okztr9X3/poster.jpg?width=720
It's opening day of grouper season and, for Capt. Justin Leake and one of his longtime fishing buddies, that means a trip offshore is in order.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/pkyE5Tme/poster.jpg?width=720
Join Rush and his good friend Anthony Solmo for an epic day of fishing in the stunning waters of Key West, Florida!
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Mwxuf9b6/poster.jpg?width=720
SoCal summer is calling, and the Local Knowledge crew is back on Ali's home turf in San Diego, California.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/2gE9uEHy/poster.jpg?width=720
When the yellowtail at the islands refuse to play, it's time to switch up the game plan. Ali and Rush pivot north of San Diego in search of hard-charging bluefin tuna.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/2hrjOYsv/poster.jpg?width=720
Returning to Venice, Louisiana for the first time in nearly a decade, Rush reconnects with longtime friends Eric and Monique Newman of Journey South Outfitters.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/aq28XzRc/poster.jpg?width=720
Everyone knows Colorado for its epic mountains and fresh powder. But on this episode of DIRT, we're digging into the unexpected side of the state.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/22mD9cNY/poster.jpg?width=720
On this episode of Huckberry Homes, we headed out to far west Texas to meet up with our friend and Home Builder Kyle Melgaard.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/rVfpRQbq/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a productive wreck.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Q0CQfHH4/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by marine scientist Nick Castillo to search for bonefish in Key Largo for both fun and study.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/njtK9zL7/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take a trip to the Marathon, FL area to challenge some feisty sharks and sneaky snook.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/JoNG5Xnt/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head offshore to the Marathon Hump, taking advantage of the 26-feet hybrid boat's versatility.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/QFxEfxGQ/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by scientist Nick Haddad, who educates our hosts on the various descending devices used to preserve stressed catch.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/h8O8lrGE/poster.jpg?width=720
Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Rich's son Reed for amazing early morning baby tarpon fishing in the Everglades.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/fVd0JSY0/poster.jpg?width=720
Featuring Capt. Jack Given and The Fish For Holly Crew Championship Style!
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/8jWFEf7E/poster.jpg?width=720
For Ali and Rush, one of the best aspects of fishing is being able to share experiences on the water with interesting people. On this episode we invite luxury watch enthusiast Eric Rivera.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/vCQHS0iK/poster.jpg?width=720
We kick off Season 2 in Tennessee where we stop in Nashville, Townsend, and Johnson City!!
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/YzR0kIk6/poster.jpg?width=720
Key Largo is famous for its vibrant coral reefs that teem with life. This episode also explores the role of Coralpalooza in coral restoration.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/NDJWcGMv/poster.jpg?width=720
Episode one hits close to home. Specifically, Josh's hometown of Seattle where we travel from the mountains to the coast in pursuit of local ingredients.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/7rZCMrxs/poster.jpg?width=720
On Huckberry Homes, we tap into the most inspiring members of the Huckberry community to offer an inside peek into how they've crafted the place they call home.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/KgmfmE4J/poster.jpg?width=720
Dan Cabela sets out to learn about the model of private ownership of wildlife in South Africa, participating in game capture, auctions and hunting to support a community.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/u81JsiPN/poster.jpg?width=720
Kyle Green and his buddy Jeremy set out on a buffalo hunt in the great state of Oklahoma, learning about the true past and potential future of the American Buffalo.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/dDdbDLKE/poster.jpg?width=720
Episode two features Michael Letchworth and his son Larkin cooking at the Holy Smokes Festival in Charleston, SC. On day two, they hit the water with Capt. Johnny Crislip.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/6Pd19QsQ/poster.jpg?width=720
Host Ryan McVinney explores boat culture in Florida's Panhandle region, from the Emerald Coast to The Big Bend and the Forgotten Coast.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/sXxZFGjp/poster.jpg?width=720
John meets with experts at Marine Surplus to select fiberglass materials for his classic 200 Aquasport project, then tackles raising the transom to 25 inches.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/fQTuE3oJ/poster.jpg?width=720
In the Pilot episode of Goin' Coastal, high school sweethearts Josh and Anna Calhoon hit their local waters of Ft. Walton Beach, FL and show off the diversity of the Estuary.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/3mRYEORL/poster.jpg?width=720
On opening day of Missouri's gun season, Nikki Boxler and the Winchester Deer Camp play cat and mouse with several mature bucks at Indian Hill Outfitters in Pike County.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/l4mITPb6/poster.jpg?width=720
A decommissioned ship is sunk to create a new artificial reef, much to the delight of divers and anglers. Plus, Adapt-Able SCUBA makes underwater adventure possible for all.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/pNhufS8M/poster.jpg?width=720
Capt. Justin Leake and a fellow guide search for redfish along the beach, but Mother Nature has other ideas and gives them a show they didn't expect.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/qFO97CUj/poster.jpg?width=720
For Capt. Justin Leake, sight fishing the beach is one of the most productive and fun ways to fish. When that doesn't work, Capt. Todd Jones suggests fishing an artificial reef.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/EZ5DVxvF/poster.jpg?width=720
Meredith McCord arrives in late spring and joins Capt. Justin Leake on the hunt for a fish she's never caught before. Lo and behold, it's a day fit for a king.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Uf7nGtmV/poster.jpg?width=720
Kyle Green and his buddy Jeremy set out on a buffalo hunt in the great state of Oklahoma, learning about the true past and potential future of the American Buffalo.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/dDdbDLKE/poster.jpg?width=720
Kyle Green heads to Yankton, South Dakota to learn about the history of the Missouri river and the invasive carp set to destroy this rich ecosystem.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/JbdhDkkk/poster.jpg?width=720
Kyle Green meets up with friends at the National Wild Turkey Federation to dive into turkey conservation, and hunts the largest subspecies of wild turkey.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Uzeo8zbt/poster.jpg?width=720
Kyle Green explores the 10,000 islands off the West Coast of Florida on his Sea-Doo while trying to catch fish after red tide.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/L7w2nWDu/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark Peterson targets the elusive Kri Kri Ibex and Mouflon in Croatia with expert guides, navigating rugged terrain and showcasing the excitement of the hunting industry.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/U7d2W5dF/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark's time in Argentina is winding down and he needs just one more species before moving on to Peru: the Brazilian Teal.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/Yy5e3yYJ/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark Peterson heads west to Nevada for a giant bull elk with an early rifle elk tag, drawing a less than 1% chance tag through the WTA TAGS Program.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/G0Hg6xZE/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/1lmYpn4w/poster.jpg?width=720
Accompany Mark Peterson on his expedition through California, where he pursues the elusive Tule Elk with his Gunwerks Muzzleloader.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/fizpb2VC/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark Peterson heads south to Florida after an alligator, toting his Gunwerks BlastR handgun as he hunts the swamps for a big mature gator.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/EDoILLZb/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California, targeting California Aoudad introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/43bplBt7/poster.jpg?width=720
Mark Peterson is duck hunting for the 4th day in Argentina and finds that luck is on his side as he hunts for a Black Headed Duck and Red Shoveler.
https://cdn.jwplayer.com/v2/media/rIuUH0JX/poster.jpg?width=720
